channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nicholas Kaufman formally requests to leave Duterte's defense team at ICC
item.description: British-Israeli lawyer Nicholas Kaufman has formally requested the International Criminal Court (ICC) to allow him to withdraw from representing former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte. Kaufman ci...

item.title: APC Urges Nigerians to Give Tinubu Time to Improve Economy
item.description: The National Publicity Secretary of the All Progressives Congress (APC), Felix Morka, don talk say President Bola Tinubu still need more time to fulfil im promises for Nigeria. For TVC News’ This Morn...

item.title: Citi increases expected returns in investor presentation on Fraser renewal
item.description: The news article reports that Citigroup has raised its return target in relation to Fraser’s business renewal strategy, which it presented to investors. While the original article text was not fully a...

item.title: Siyabonga Khumalo Graduates with Exceptional Academic Achievements at UKZN
item.description: Siyabonga Khumalo, a remarkable student from the University of KwaZulu-Natal, has left many inspired after graduating with outstanding academic honours. Despite being short-statured, Siyabonga achieve...

item.title: DMK Leader Kanimozhi Requests Separate Seating in Lok Sabha After Congress Leaves SPA
item.description: On Saturday, Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) MP Kanimozhi Karunanidhi formally wrote to Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla, seeking a separate seating arrangement for her party members in the Lower House. The...

item.title: Athletics SA to Guide Government Intervention as Soweto Marathon Faces Prize Money Issues
item.description: Athletics South Africa (ASA) has welcomed the government's decision to step in and assist with the troubled Soweto Marathon, after athletes reported that prize money from last year’s race remains unpa...

item.title: Real Madrid Sanction Tchouameni and Valverde After Training Ground Clash
item.description: Real Madrid don fine Aurelien Tchouameni and Federico Valverde €500,000 each after serious quarrel wey happen for training ground. The issue escalate during midweek training sessions, and e lead to in...

item.title: Aritzia Reports Strong Q4 Growth with Significant Profit and Revenue Increases
item.description: Aritzia, the Canadian fashion retailer, reported a strong financial performance in the fourth quarter of the fiscal year. The company's net profit increased by 35 per cent compared to the same period ...

item.title: Plateau High Court Schedules July 1–2 for Trial in Angwan Rukuba Killing Case
item.description: The Plateau State High Court for Jos don fix July 1 and 2, 2026, for proper hearing of the suspects wey dey linked to the killing of people for Angwan Rukuba community in Jos North Local Government. T...

item.title: Gauteng High Court Rules CircumQ Tender Unlawful for Boys Aged 10–14
item.description: The Gauteng High Court in Pretoria has ruled that the national tender awarded to CircumQ in 2023 is unlawful, particularly concerning its use on boys aged ten to 14. The court found that the National ...

item.title: Ninth suspect held over targeted arson attack on Jewish community ambulances in London
item.description: A ninth individual has been arrested in relation to the arson attack on Hatzola ambulances in north-west London, authorities confirmed. The 48-year-old man was detained on suspicion of conspiracy to c...

item.title: Air India Ahmedabad Crash Investigation in Final Stage, Report Likely Next Month
item.description: The Union Civil Aviation Minister, Shri Rammohan Naidu, has informed that the investigation into the tragic Air India Flight AI 171 crash in Ahmedabad is in its final stage. The report is expected to ...

item.title: Arteta Urges Arsenal to Stay Focused Ahead of Crucial West Ham Clash in Title Race
item.description: Mikel Arteta don urge him Arsenal players make dem stay grounded and focused as dem prepare for one very important Premier League match against West Ham. This message come shortly after the team enjoy...

item.title: Bare Sahara Ahmed Remains in Custody Amid Hate Speech Investigation in Kenya
item.description: Social media was buzzing with claims that Bare Sahara Ahmed, a Kenyan aspiring politician from Garissa, was released immediately after being arrested for making ethnically charged statements in a vira...

item.title: Taxi Operators Seek Government Support Amid Rising Fuel Costs
item.description: Taxi operators in Cape Town are warning of impending fare increases following a sharp rise in fuel prices. As of 6 May 2026, petrol increased by R3.27 per litre and diesel by R5.27 per litre, signific...

item.title: Bradford drug dealer sentenced to over 16 years after £1.6m cash seizure
item.description: A 58-year-old drug dealer, Zulfiqar Shah, has been sentenced to 16 years and six months in prison at Bradford Crown Court following the discovery of more than £1.6 million in cash at a property in Bra...

item.title: Cloudflare attributes 1,100 layoffs to AI amid record revenue growth
item.description: Cloudflare announced a workforce reduction of roughly 1,100 employees, representing 20% of its staff, citing the impact of AI on internal productivity rather than cost-cutting measures. This marks the...

item.title: Updates on Tamil Nadu Government Formation and New Chief Minister Announcement
item.description: The process of forming the new government in Tamil Nadu has been closely followed across the state. After the recent assembly elections, parties like the DMK, AIADMK, Congress, and BJP are negotiating...

item.title: Cowboys Host Eels in Round 10 NRL Clash at Queensland Country Bank Stadium
item.description: In Round 10 of the 2026 NRL Premiership, the North Queensland Cowboys hosted the Parramatta Eels at the Queensland Country Bank Stadium in Townsville. The match featured several standout moments, incl...

item.title: Understanding Perioral Dermatitis and How Skincare Overuse Can Trigger It
item.description: Perioral dermatitis is a growing skin condition marked by small red bumps around the mouth, nose and eyes. Often misdiagnosed as acne, it is actually an inflammatory reaction linked to overuse of skin...
